attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT    
	EXGCC.BATCH_ID                      
	,EXGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
	,EXGCC.GLOBAL_NAME                   
	,EXGCC.ACCOUNT_TYPE                  
	,EXGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID          
	,EXGCC.ENABLED_FLAG                  
	,EXGCC.PRESERVE_FLAG                 
	,EXGCC.SEGMENT1                      
	,EXGCC.SEGMENT2                      
	,EXGCC.SEGMENT3                      
	,EXGCC.SEGMENT4                      
	,EXGCC.SEGMENT5                      
	,EXGCC.SEGMENT6                      
	,EXGCC.START_DATE_ACTIVE             
	,EXGCC.END_DATE_ACTIVE               
	,EXGCC.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
	,EXGCC.CREATE_DATETIME               
	,ACTION_CODE   
	,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
	(
	SELECT
		BATCH_ID                      
		,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,ACCOUNT_TYPE                  
		,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID          
		,ENABLED_FLAG                  
		,PRESERVE_FLAG                 
		,SEGMENT1                      
		,SEGMENT2                      
		,SEGMENT3                      
		,SEGMENT4                      
		,SEGMENT5                      
		,SEGMENT6                      
		,START_DATE_ACTIVE             
		,END_DATE_ACTIVE               
		,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,CREATE_DATETIME               
		,ACTION_CODE   
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SMGCC     
	UNION
        SELECT
		BATCH_ID                      
		,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,ACCOUNT_TYPE                  
		,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID          
		,ENABLED_FLAG                  
		,PRESERVE_FLAG                 
		,SEGMENT1                      
		,SEGMENT2                      
		,SEGMENT3                      
		,SEGMENT4                      
		,SEGMENT5                      
		,SEGMENT6                      
		,START_DATE_ACTIVE             
		,END_DATE_ACTIVE               
		,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,CREATE_DATETIME               
		,ACTION_CODE   
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SCGCC     
	UNION
	SELECT
		BATCH_ID                      
		,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,ACCOUNT_TYPE                  
		,CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID          
		,ENABLED_FLAG                  
		,PRESERVE_FLAG                 
		,SEGMENT1                      
		,SEGMENT2                      
		,SEGMENT3                      
		,SEGMENT4                      
		,SEGMENT5                      
		,SEGMENT6                      
		,START_DATE_ACTIVE             
		,END_DATE_ACTIVE               
		,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,CREATE_DATETIME               
		,ACTION_CODE   
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC
	) EXGCC
WHERE (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
					WHERE NSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = EXGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
					AND EXGCC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
					AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFCT
                   WHERE EXGCC.SEGMENT1 = NFCT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
                   AND NFCT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'))
 AND (SEGMENT1,GLOBAL_NAME, CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID)
  NOT IN
	(SELECT EDCSM.COMPANY, NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME, NSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EDCSM, 
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE EDCSM.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  
	AND NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EDCSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
	AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
	UNION ALL
	SELECT NGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE, NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME, NSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER NGL,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE NGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND GL_TYPE_CODE IN ('CONSOL ONLY','OPERATING')
	)

SELECT 
                (CASE WHEN NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 THEN 'CONSOL ONLY' ELSE 'OPERATING' END) GL_TYPE_CODE, 
                EDCSM.COMPANY BK_COMPANY_CODE,
                (CASE WHEN (CAST(SUBSTR(EDCSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,1,4) AS INTEGER)) = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
                AND (CAST(SUBSTR(EDCSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,5,2) AS INTEGER)) = NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
                THEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE ELSE CURRENT_DATE END) START_TV_DATE,
                (CASE WHEN (CAST(SUBSTR(EDCSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,1,4) AS INTEGER)) = NFM1.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
                AND (CAST(SUBSTR(EDCSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,5,2) AS INTEGER)) = NFM1.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
                THEN NFM1.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE ELSE CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) END) END_TV_DATE,
                NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
                EDCSM.CURRENCY_CODE BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
                ACTION_CODE
FROM 
                $$STGDB.ST_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EDCSM
                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                                ON EDCSM.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME        
                INNER JOIN         $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
                                ON   (CAST(SUBSTR(EDCSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,1,4) AS INTEGER)) = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
                                AND  (CAST(SUBSTR(EDCSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,5,2) AS INTEGER)) = NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
                LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM1
                                ON   (CAST(SUBSTR(EDCSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,1,4) AS INTEGER)) = NFM1.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
                                AND  (CAST(SUBSTR(EDCSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,5,2) AS INTEGER)) = NFM1.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICTV
                                ON    NICTV.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE = EDCSM.CURRENCY_CODE
                                AND       NICTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFCTV
                                ON   NFCTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EDCSM.COMPANY
                                AND       NFCTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101
                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                                ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EDCSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
                                AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
UNION ALL
SELECT 
                (CASE WHEN NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 THEN 'CONSOL ONLY' ELSE 'OPERATING' END) GL_TYPE_CODE, 
                EECSM.COMPANY BK_COMPANY_CODE,
                (CASE WHEN (CAST(SUBSTR(EECSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,1,4) AS INTEGER)) = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
                AND (CAST(SUBSTR(EECSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,5,2) AS INTEGER)) = NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
                THEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE ELSE CURRENT_DATE END) START_TV_DATE,
                (CASE WHEN (CAST(SUBSTR(EECSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,1,4) AS INTEGER)) = NFM1.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
                AND (CAST(SUBSTR(EECSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,5,2) AS INTEGER)) = NFM1.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
                THEN NFM1.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE ELSE CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) END) END_TV_DATE,
                NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as  SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
                EECSM.CURRENCY_CODE BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
                ACTION_CODE
FROM 
                $$EXCEPDB.EX_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM 
                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                                ON EECSM.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME        
                INNER JOIN         $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
                                ON   (CAST(SUBSTR(EECSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,1,4) AS INTEGER)) = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
                                AND  (CAST(SUBSTR(EECSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,5,2) AS INTEGER)) = NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
                LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM1
                                ON   (CAST(SUBSTR(EECSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,1,4) AS INTEGER)) = NFM1.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
                                AND  (CAST(SUBSTR(EECSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,5,2) AS INTEGER)) = NFM1.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICTV
                                ON    NICTV.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE = EECSM.CURRENCY_CODE
                                AND       NICTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFCTV
                                ON   NFCTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EECSM.COMPANY
                                AND       NFCTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101
                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                                ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
                                AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

SELECT
SECSM.BATCH_ID,
SECSM.COMPANY,
SECSM.GLOBAL_NAME,
SECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
SECSM.CURRENCY_CODE,
SECSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,
SECSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,
SECSM.CREATE_DATETIME,
SECSM.ACTION_CODE
FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP SECSM
WHERE   (
	    ((CAST(SUBSTR(SECSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,1,4) AS INTEGER)),
		(CAST(SUBSTR(SECSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,5,2) AS INTEGER)))
            NOT IN (SELECT NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
			FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM)
	OR
		NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICTV
		 		WHERE NICTV.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE = SECSM.CURRENCY_CODE
		   	  	  AND NICTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101)
	OR
		NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFCTV
				WHERE	NFCTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SECSM.COMPANY
		   		  AND	NFCTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101)
 	OR
		NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                    WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
                    AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SECSM.GLOBAL_NAME
                    AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	)

SELECT
TVOUTPUT.GL_TYPE_CODE
,TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE AS START_TV_DATE
, COALESCE (MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY)
	OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
					   , TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC
		ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING)
	, DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DATE
, TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
, TVOUTPUT.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
, TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
									  , TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
			ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) AS RANK_INDEX
, (CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NGTT.BK_COMPANY_CODE IS NOT NULL
	THEN 'U' 
	ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT	
		BATCH_ID,
		GL_TYPE_CODE,
		BK_COMPANY_CODE,
                START_TV_DATE,
                SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
		EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		ACTION_CODE,
		EXCEPTION_TYPE,
		ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_COMPANY_CODE, SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
		ORDER	BY EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM
	FROM (
		SELECT    
		GLC.BATCH_ID,
		(CASE WHEN NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 THEN 'CONSOL' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) GL_TYPE_CODE,
		NFCT.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
		CAST(GLC.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
		NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS  BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
		GLC.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		GLC.ACTION_CODE,
		GLC.EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM 
			   (
				SELECT
					SMGCC.BATCH_ID,
					SMGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,          
					SMGCC.SEGMENT1,                  
					SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
					SMGCC.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
					SMGCC.ACTION_CODE,
					'NE' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
				FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SMGCC     
				UNION 
				SELECT
					SOGCC.BATCH_ID,
					SOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,          
					SOGCC.SEGMENT1,                  
					SOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
					SOGCC.CREATE_DATETIME AS  EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,  
					SOGCC.ACTION_CODE,
					'NE' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
				FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC
				UNION
                                SELECT
					SCGCC.BATCH_ID,
					SCGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,          
					SCGCC.SEGMENT1,                  
					SCGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
					SCGCC.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
					SCGCC.ACTION_CODE,
					'NE' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
				FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SCGCC   
                                UNION 
				SELECT
					EXGCC.BATCH_ID,
					EXGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,          
					EXGCC.SEGMENT1,                  
					EXGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,
					EXGCC.CREATE_DATETIME  AS  EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
		                        EXGCC.ACTION_CODE,
					EXGCC.EXCEPTION_TYPE
				FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EXGCC
				) GLC
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
					ON GLC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
				INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFCT
					ON GLC.SEGMENT1 = NFCT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
					AND NFCT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
				INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
					ON NSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = GLC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
					AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
				WHERE (BK_COMPANY_CODE,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
				  NOT IN
						(
						SELECT BK_COMPANY_CODE, SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY FROM $$WORKDB.W_GENERAL_LEDGER where END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' 
						UNION ALL
						SELECT BK_COMPANY_CODE, SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER
						WHERE GL_TYPE_CODE IN ('CONSOL ONLY','OPERATING')
						)		
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		-999 BATCH_ID, 
		NGT.GL_TYPE_CODE,
		NGT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
		NGT.START_TV_DATE,
		NGT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		NGT.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
		NGT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		'X' ACTION_CODE,
		'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_TV NGT 
		WHERE  GL_TYPE_CODE IN ('CONSOL','UNKNOWN')
		           AND END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
		         AND (BK_COMPANY_CODE,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
		         IN ( SELECT GLCI.SEGMENT1,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
		                    FROM ( 	
		                   				 SELECT
										SMGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,          
										SMGCC.SEGMENT1,                  
										SMGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
									FROM  $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SMGCC     
									UNION 
									SELECT
										SOGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,          
										SOGCC.SEGMENT1,                  
										SOGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
									FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SOGCC
                                                                        
									UNION
                                                                        SELECT
										SCGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,          
										SCGCC.SEGMENT1,                  
										SCGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
									FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS SCGCC     
									UNION  
									SELECT
										EXGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,          
										EXGCC.SEGMENT1,                  
										EXGCC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
									FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EXGCC WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
									)GLCI
							  	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
									ON GLCI.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
								INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
									ON NSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = GLCI.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID
									AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	               )
	)TVINPUT
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, TVINPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
												, TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE
									ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) =1
)TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_TV NGTT 
	 ON   NGTT.GL_TYPE_CODE IN ('CONSOL','UNKNOWN')  
	 AND  TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NGTT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND  TVOUTPUT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  = NGTT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NGTT.END_TV_DATE = CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
